name: sd_a9_declorder_plain
drl:
rule "RO"
when
    LK($v : f0)
then
end
rule "RJ"
when
    not LK()
then
    insertLogical(new LK(7));
end
_finding: oracle [RJ,RO] vs engine [RJ]: LAZY self-break + plain observer declared BEFORE the justifier at equal salience — the oracle's drop lands at RJ's item pop (after RO's), the engine drains early. D-187 L-SD row: (cloud x self-defeat) landing — EAGER justifier (no-loop/dyn-sal) => drop lands at the firing's eager-flush, no <=-salience glimpse, queue position irrelevant (a14, min608/fz_7_608); LAZY justifier => drop lands at the justifier's ITEM POP — same-salience observers glimpse iff queue position precedes the justifier's item (decl order in same-firing-born shapes; a13 split), k irrelevant (a15); strictly-higher always glimpses (t11), strictly-lower never.
